top_signals.title: Oil rises as U.S. continues to strike Tehran, reinstates blockade of Iranian ports
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose Wednesday after U.S. forces struck Tehran and Washington reinstated its naval blockade of Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI ignites ‘ignored sector’ for Japan chipmaker Kioxia
top_signals.summary: The global race to build artificial intelligence data centers has upped business for chipmakers, creating shortages and sending prices soaring for memory components in particular.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
